def: s. A pavilion: see سرا پرده sarā-parda.

adj. & s.f. Performing, accomplishing, finishing, completing, (used chiefly at the end of comp., e.g. kār-pardāz, 'accomplishing the business'); — finish, accomplishment, perfection; frame or setting (of a picture).
more: (from پرداختن) 1. part. Performing, finishing, completing; performing on musick. 2. s. Finish, perfection.

def: s. f. (In compos.) Performance.
direct plural; oblique/vocative singular
s.m. See s.v. para, par. s.m. Quicksilver, mercury; — adj. Heavy, weighty
more: n. m. See بديس Pardes chhānā , v. n. To make a home in another country; to be long absent. 1. Jal jāë ye keoṛā! bajar paṛo yā des! Jin boyā ye keoṛā, un chhāyā pardes . Dohā. Fire burn this orris tree! may lightnings blast the country free! He who this tree did plant hath made his home in a far countrie. 2. Des chorī pardes bhīk . Prov. Better beg in a foreign land than steal in your own. 3. Pardes kales Naresan ko . Prov. The greatest must suffer in a strange country.
1. s. m. Remote or foreign country. 2. adj. In another country, abroad.
subs: pārā pilānā (meṅ, -ko), To fill or load with quicksilver; to make heavy

def: n. m. A foreigner; stranger; a new man ( ūprī , 1) Pardesi kī p/?/īt ko sab kā man lalchāë, Doī bāt kā khoṭ hai—rahe, na saṅg le jāë . Dohā. The stranger's love all hearts have tried to gain; but two Drawbacks—he'll neither stay nor take you with him too.
more: s. m. Foreigner, stranger. adj. Foreign.

def: = S پردهرم परधर्म par-dharm, See s.v. para, par.
= S پردهن परधन par-dhan, See s.v. para, par.
s.m. See s.v. para, par. s.m. Quicksilver, mercury; — adj. Heavy, weighty
subs: pārā pilānā (meṅ, -ko), To fill or load with quicksilver; to make heavy

def: adj. See s.v. para, par. s.m. Quicksilver, mercury; — adj. Heavy, weighty
subs: pārā pilānā (meṅ, -ko), To fill or load with quicksilver; to make heavy

def: s.m. See s.v. para, par. s.m. Quicksilver, mercury; — adj. Heavy, weighty
subs: pārā pilānā (meṅ, -ko), To fill or load with quicksilver; to make heavy

def: oblique plural of پَرْدَہ (parda, “cover; curtain; cover”)
adj. See s.v. para, par. s.m. Quicksilver, mercury; — adj. Heavy, weighty
subs: pārā pilānā (meṅ, -ko), To fill or load with quicksilver; to make heavy

def: intj. S. पर distance. Stand off. See alag , intj. Dam, dilāsā na de, abas, annā; Chal, chakhe, dūr ho! pare bhī haṭ! Mah. Wom. Inshā.
more: adv. Opp. of ware . 1. A part; further off ( alag 2). 2. On the other side; yonder; beyond; on the further side. pare rahnā , v. n. To keep further off or aloof; to abstain from.

def: adv. Beyond, yonder, at a distance; apart, further off, away (from, -se); on the other side (of, -ke); out of, or beyond, the reach (of); after, afterwards; in another world, hereafter
more: adv. Beyond, yonder, at a distance. پري رهنا pare rahnā, To remain at a distance.
subs: (-se), To fly out of the reach (cf), to get away (from)
(-se), To remain at a distance (from); to keep aloof (from); to abstain (from)
(-se), To get to a distance (from), get away (from)
On the other side of the wall.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian پری (parī), from Middle Persian plyk' (parīg).

def: s.m. Soup (made of rice), &c. = paleʼo, q.v. s.m. Soup, broth; ground rice or potherbs (used as a thickening for soup, &c.); — the milk of flour or wheat.
more: s. m. Soup. See پليو paleʼo.

def: s.m. Land watered after ploughing, or flooded before the final ploughing and levelling of the land.
s.m. Land watered after ploughing, or flooded before the final ploughing and levelling of the land.
a surname, Parekh, from Gujarati
s.m. = parīkshā, q.v.
more: n. m. S. परीक्षा. 1. Discrimination; judgment; penetration. Ek nagrī ke rājā āṭh, Niyārā niyārā sab kā ṭhāṭ, Būjh-bājh ke kiyā parekhā, Ek bahī meṅ sab kā lekhā, Par un meṅ hai itnā bīch, Adhe uttam, ādhe nīch . Riddle. Ans. Ganjfā . A game of cards. One city, and in it eight kings, Each one his retinue separate brings, With judgment all were fairly dealt, Each one's account in one book dwelt, But 'mongst them all one difference see, Half high, and half of less degree. 2. Difference; variation; divergence. Hameṅ tumhārī bāt kā kuchh parekhā nahīṅ hai . 3. The act of abstaining or keeping aloof. E jī, hamāre hāṅ āne se kyā parekhā hai? Wom. Madam, you seem to avoid my house. 4. Regret; concern; sorrow. Tum se baṛā parekhā hai, tum ne merā kām nahīṅ kīyā .
s. m. Regret, concern, contrition, repentance.
s. f. Examination, &c. See پرچها parichchhā and پرکهـ parakh.

def: s.m. Sorrow, concern, regret, contrition; aversion, objection.
s.m. = parīkshaṇ, q.v. s.m. = S پريکشنا परीक्षणा parīkshaṇā, s.f. = parīkshā.
s.m. A beam.
corr. of par-des, q.v.s.v. para, par. s.m. See s.v. para, par. s.m. Quicksilver, mercury; — adj. Heavy, weighty
subs: pārā pilānā (meṅ, -ko), To fill or load with quicksilver; to make heavy

def: s.m. A kind of medicinal herb which grows on brick walls during the rains.

ety: act. part. of pareshīdan; Zend and S. vi+rić
def: adj. Dispersed, scattered; disordered, confused; dishevelled, tossed (as hair); amazed, distracted, perplexed, bewildered, deranged; troubled, distressed, wretched; ruined
more: adj. 1. Distracted; perplexed; bewildered; troubled; wretched. 2. Tossed (as hair); disordered; deranged; dishevelled. 3. Dispersed; scattered. pareshāṅ-hāl , adj. Embarrassed or distressed circumstances. pareshāṅ karnā , v. a. To worry; harrass; distract; perturb.

adj. Dispersed, perplexed, confused, troubled, amazed, dishevelled, disordered, distracted, distressed, deranged, ruined, wretched. پريشان حال pareshān-ḥāl, Distressed in condition. پريشان خاطري pareshān-ḵẖāt̤ir-ī, s. f. Trouble of mind. پريشان دل pareshān-dil, adj. Troubled in mind. پريشان دلي pareshān-dil-ī, s. f. Trouble of mind. پريشان کرنا pareshān karnā, To perplex, confuse, confound, trouble, distract, perturb, disorder, derange. پريشان کـﮩنا pareshān kahnā, To talk foolishly from absence of mind. پريشان گوٴي pareshān-go-ī, s. f. Confused or absurd talk. پريشان نظري pareshān-naz̤ar-ī, s. f. Confusion of sight.
subs: adj. Distressed or troubled in mind; — pareshān-ḵẖāt̤irī, s.f. Trouble of mind, distraction
v.t. To perplex, confuse, confound, bewilder, perturb, distract; to dishevel, toss, disorder, derange; to worry, harass

def: s.f. Dispersion, scattering, confusion, disorder, derangement, perplexity, bewilderment, perturbation, distraction; distress, embarrassment, trouble, misery.
more: n. f. Perplexity; perturbance; embarrassment; bewilderment; distraction; trouble; misery.
s. f. Dispersion, scattering, confusion, derangement, distress, misery, perplexity, distraction, perturbation, trouble.

def: s.m. A parade (of troops); parade-ground.
s.m. A large reel ( = partā).
more: n. m. Dim. paretī , n. f. S. परितः A large reel.
s. m. A reel (for winding yarn).

def: s.f. A small reel (dim. of paretā, q.v.).
v.t. To wind, to reel (thread or yarn).
more: v. a. To wind; reel. Kātā sūt paretne ko, pakkī roṭī juṛyāne ko . E. Prov. The thread already spun she'll reel, the baked cakes she can pile and deal. (She has no mind for the hard work).
v. a. To reel (thread or yarn).

def: s.m. A dove, turtle dove, pigeon.
more: n. m. S. पारावत A pigeon ( kabūtar ).

def: s.m. Step, stride, pace.
s. m. Epidendron: see باندا bāndā. (Banglā).
s.m. Sticks and straw; anything worthless, rubbish.
more: s. Sticks and straw; a worthless thing.

def: s.f. A crucible, a goldsmith's moulding-pot ( = praghaṭī, q.v.). s.f. = prakaṭatā, q.v. s.f. = S پرکٿتو प्रकटत्व pra-kaṭaṭva, s.m. Visibility, apparency, manifestation, clearness, publicity.
s.m. Subdivision of a ẓilaʻ or district (about the size of a barony); the country; any distant place
more: n. m. S. प्रगण a country. 1. A sub-division of a zila or district nearly equal to a barony. 2. The country; abroad; any distant place. 3. (Wom.) The part of the country where one's husband is employed.
s. m. An inferiour division of a country (less than a ضلع ẓilﻌ ) nearly equalling a barony. پرگنه دار pargana-dār, s. m. The superiour officer of a pargana, lord of the barony.
subs: s.m. The superior officer of a pargana; lord of a barony
adv. According to parganas; according to district (settlement, &c.).

def: n. m. The superior officer of a parganah ; lord of the barony.
s.m. irreg. Ar. pl. of pargana, q.v.
irreg. Ar. pl. of the P. pargana, q.v.
more: s. m. plur. of پرگنه pargana, q. v.

def: adj. Of or relating to a pargana or parganas
subs: s.f. Amount of revenue received at the head office or taḥṣīl of the pargana, from the several subdivisions thereof, after deducting the charges of collecting
s.m. Charges or expenditure of a pargana (to be deducted from the gross revenue).

def: s.m. A pair of compasses ( = parkār); household furniture; worldly things; a collar or necklace.
more: s. f. 1. A pair of compasses. 2. Household furniture. 3. A collar or necklace.

def: s.f. Work done with compasses.
more: s. f. Work done with compasses.

def: s.m. (Prov.) = prakāś, q.v. s.m. See pra-kāś.
s.m. (Prov.) = prakāś, q.v. s.m. See pra-kāś.

adj. S. प्रकट Pr. paaḍam, pāaḍam . Obvious; notorious; public; apparent; manifest. Parghaṭ ān, pīchhe kah ānā, Adham na eh jag tāhī samānā . Prov. Who says one thing before, another at your back, In all the world, be sure, there's none so base a hack. parghaṭ karnā , v. a. 1. To make known. See prakāsh k . 2. To bring to light; divulge; disclose; expose. parghaṭ honā, parghaṭnā , v. n. 1. To appear; to become manifest. Pāp chhipāë nā chhipe jas lahsun ki boë, Khādi khan-ke gāṛye āpūī parghaṭ hoë . Dohā. Your sin can no more hidden be than smell of garlic can, Though buried in the earth it be, revealed its presence plain. 2. To be born; to come into the world. Bābū Sarvan jāhī din parghaṭ āë, Sakhī sab mil-kar maṅgal gāë . Song. Sarvan.
s.f. An ortolan (a species of Alauda); — feathering or winging an arrow; the feather so applied.
more: s. f. An ortolan (a species of Alauda).

def: s.m. Spotted antelope; hog-deer, Cervus porcinus.

ety: perf. part. of paṛhnā; — and = Prk. पढिओ = S. पठितः, rt. पठ्
def: part. adj. Read, well-read, of extensive reading, learned, lettered
more: part. pass. Read, learned, of much reading. پڙهاگنا paṛhā-gunā, adj. A learned, experienced man.
subs: s.m. A consummate knave, a perfect devil
adj. & s.m. Educated, learned; — an educated man, a learned man, an experienced man
adj. & s.m. Educated, learned, lettered, &c. = paṛhā-guṇā.

def: s.f. Teaching, tuition; method of teaching; tuition fee
n. f. 1. The method of teaching. 2. School fee. paṛhāī kā naqshah , n. m. Scheme of study; routine; time table.
s.f. The act of reading, reading.
more: s. f. The act of reading.

ety: caus. of paṛhnā; — paṛhā˚ = Prk. पढावे˚ = S. पाठय˚, caus. of पठ्
def: v.t. To cause to read, to make (one) read, learn, or study; to teach, instruct; to teach (a bird) to talk; to tell, show, put (one) up to; to pervert.
more: (caus. of پڙهنا) v. a. To cause or teach to read, to instruct, to teach, to teach to speak or sing (as, birds).

def: v. a. S. पठ् to read. 1. To make one read; to teach; instruct. 2. To put one up to; pervert; poison one's ears or mind. Paṭṭī paṛhānā .
s.f. Reading; citation, maxim, precept; spell, charm.
more: s. f. A reading, a spell.

def: n. m. 1. A citation; maxim; precept. 2. A spell; charm; magic. Maiṅ tumheṅ ek paṛhant batātā hūṅ, roz paṛhā karo . One precept I give you, read, always read.

ety: Zend fra+rt. hać, for hakhsh; s. pra+sać
def: s.m. Abstaining (from), keeping aloof (from), abstinence, abstemiousness, forbearance, continence, control of the passions, caution, sobriety, temperance, moderation
more: (from پرهيختن or پرهيزيدن) s.m. Abstinence, forbearance, continence, abstaining or keeping aloof, control of the passions, caution, sobriety. بدي پرهيز badī-parhez, Abstaining from evil. پرهيزکرنا parhez karnā, v. a. 1. To control oneʼs passions. 2. To abstain (from), to keep aloof, or be on oneʼs guard (from), to avoid. 3. To observe a regimen.
subs: (-se), To abstain (from), keep aloof (from), to be on one's guard (against), to avoid; to control one's passions or appetites, to be continent, to be temperate; to observe a regimen
adj. & s.m. Abstinent, abstemious, temperate, moderate, continent, sober, just; — one who controls his passions, an abstemious person, &c.
s.f. Abstinence, control of the passions, &c. = parhez.

def: n. m. 1. Keeping from or aloof; abstemiousness; abstinence; self-control; continence. Mar jāiye, pa yār se bosah na māṅgye! Parhez bhī davā se ziyādah mufid hai . Better to die than of your mistress beg a kiss, Know abstinence than medicine more wholesome is. 2. ( parhezgārī ). Temperance; moderation; frugality; sobriety. parhez karnā , v. a. 1. To abstain from; to keep aloof; to be continent. 2. To be temperate or frugal; to observe a regimen.
adj. 1. Abstinent; continent 2. Temperate; moderate; sparing. parhezī khānā , n. m. A patient's diet.
adj. and subst. Abstinent, one who controls his passions, continent, abstemious, sober.
s. f. Abstinence, control of the passions.
adj. = parhez-gār, q.v.s.v. parhez; — (food, &c.) that should be abstained from; (food) suitable for one under a regimen.
more: adj. 1. Fit for a person under a regimen. 2. Same as پرهيزگار q. v.

def: s.f. Crossing (a river, when travelling on it).
more: s. f. 1. Crossing a river (when travelling on it). 2. A young buffalo, a buffalo calf.

def: s.f. Young buffalo, buffalo-calf.
s.f. A mullet.

ety: Prk. पढणअं = S. पठनीयं, rt. पठ्
def: v.t. To read, repeat, recite; to say; to mutter a spell; to learn, study (with acc. & abl.); to make out, decipher; to talk (as a bird)
more: v. a. To read, repeat, say, decipher, speak. پڙهني والا pāṛhne-wālā, Reader.
subs: adj. Fit to be read; what can be read, readable, legible
paṛhne-hārā, s.m. (f. -ī), Reader, reciter; learner, student.
wety: Inherited from Prakrit 𑀧𑀠𑀇 (paḍhaï), from Sanskrit पृथ् (pṛth).

def: v. a. 1. To read; repeat; recite; learn to read. 1. Paṛhe na likkhe, nām Mohammad Fāzil . Prov. He can neither read nor write, and he is called Mohammad Fazil (an accomplished scholar). 2. Paṛhe Fārsī, beche tel! ye dekho qudrat kā khel! Prov. He reads Persian and sells oil! see sportive Nature's fantasy! 3. Paṛhe totā, paṛhe mainā, kahīṅ sipāhī kā pūt bhī paṛhā hai? Prov. Parrots and mainas may read, but the soldier's son never! 4. Paṛhye, bhaīyä, soī jā meṅ haṅḍyā khudbud hoī . Prov. The best learning is that which makes the pot boil. 5. Māthe pe kheṅch ṭīkā, yā hāth le-ke mālā, Pothī bagal meṅ dābī, zunnār ko saṅbhālā, Pūjā, kathā bakhānī, Gītā sabad nikālā, Kuchh ban sakā na, āyā jab jān lene-wālā, Bed o Purān paṛh-kar missar huā to phir kyā? On death. Nazīr. Sectarial spot on forehead made, or told of beads a string, A book clapped 'neath his arm, or vested with the Brahman's string, Or mumbling worship or Puran, or Gitā hard expounding, Before the life-destroying king avails no single thing, Nor Veds, Purans, nor Pandit's lore, or other bootless thing. 2. To peruse; make out; decipher. 3. To mutter a charm, incantation or spell. 4. To talk as a bird. Laṭp/?/ṭ, panchhī chatur, sujhān, Paṛho, parbatī, Srī Bhagwān . The parrot's lesson. Repeat it oft, my bird, so knowing and so clever, Say, hill bird, say oft Srī Bhagwān , His name say ever. paṛ'hā, paṛhā likkhā, paṛhā gunā , adj. Literate; educated. 1. Paṛhe ghar kī paṛhī billī . Prov. A learned house, a learned cat. 2. Paṛhoṅ meṅ an-paṛh jaise hansoṅ meṅ kavvā . Prov. An illiterate man amongst educated men is a crow among swans. paṛhā jin , n. m. A perfect devil; a consummate knave. paṛhne-jog , adj. Legible; what can be read. paṛhne-wālā , n. m. A reader.
v.t. To cause (one) to be taught reading; &c.; to have (one) taught (by).
more: (caus. of پڙهنا) v. a. To cause to read or repeat, to teach to read.

def: s.f. Time, turn, &c. = bārī, q.v.; — a cup; a large leathern vessel
more: n. f. 1. A large leathern vessel. 2. E. A turn ( bārī ).
subs: v.n. To arrange to take by turns.

def: prep. (used at the beginning of compounds), About, around, round about, all round; full, quite, entirely, excessively.
wety: Inherited from Sauraseni Prakrit 𑀧𑀭𑀺 (pari), 𑀉𑀧𑁆𑀧𑀭𑀺 (uppari), from Sanskrit उपरि (upari, “above”).

def: s.f. A fairy; (fig.) a beautiful woman
more: A prefix signifying about, around, all round. It often has merely an intensive force; as in परिपूर्ण completely filled.

n. f. A fairy; a beautiful woman parī-band , n. m. 1. An ornament. 2. A trick in wrestling. parī-paikar, parī-chehrā, parī-rū, parī-vash , adj. Fairy-faced; angelic; beautiful. parī-khuāṅ , n. m. One who holds the fairies and genii in subjection; one who 'calls spirits from the vasty deep;' a magician. parī-zād ; Illit. parī-zāt , n. A fairy; a beauty. Haiṅ jo dunyā meṅ ye parī-zādeṅ Yehī hūreṅ baneṅgīṅ jannat meṅ . Sālik. The beauties in this world you see The Houris of the next will be.
s. f. A fairy. پري پيکر parī-paikar or پري چـﮩره parī-chihra or پري رخسار parī-ruḵẖsār or پري رو parī-rū, Fairy-faced, angelick. پري وش parī-wash, Fairy-like.
subs: parī-ćěhrā, pari-ruḵẖsār, pari-rū, adj. Fairy-faced, beautiful, angelic
s.m. One who holds the fairies and genn in subjection, or who has them at his call; a magician
s.f. Calling aid from the fairies, exorcism
adj. & s.m. Possessed by fairies or demous; one so possessed; one who has the fairies at his command
adj. & s.m. Fairy-born; beautiful, lovely; — a fairy; a beauty
s.m. The shadow of a fairy,' possession by an evil spirit
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian پری (parī), from Middle Persian plyk' (parīg).

def: s.f. Buffalo-calf ( = pāṛhī; paṛiyā).
s.m. The coral tree, Erythrina indica; the Nīm-tree, Azadirachta indica; a species of pine, Pinus devadaru; the saral, Pinus longifolia.
s.m. = pari-bhav, q.v. s.m. Contumely, insult, injury, humiliation, degradation, disrespect, contempt, disgrace.
more: s. m. Power, influence, majesty, dignity.

def: s.f. Speech, conversation, discourse; blame, censure, abuse, ridicule; explanation, definition; technical term, technicality; terminology; a general maxim; (in Medicine) prognosis.
adj. Speaking, discoursing; explaining.
s.m. Contumely, insult, injury, humiliation, degradation, disrespect, contempt, disgrace.
s.m. = pari-bhav, q.v. s.m. Contumely, insult, injury, humiliation, degradation, disrespect, contempt, disgrace.
adj. & s.m. Treating with contempt, slighting, despising; insulting, mocking, ridiculing; — slighter, despiser, &c.
s.m. Name of a drug, a sort of Costus, Costus speciosus.
s.m. Enjoyment; sexual intercourse, possession, a means of enjoyment; living at another's cost, using another's property without his leave, illegal use of another's goods.
s.m. Going about wandering, going astray; mistake, error.
s.m. Turning round, revolving; going about, wandering.
part. adj. Fallen, cast down, degraded, corrupted; deprived of; lost.
s.m. Servant, attendant, guard.
adj. & s.m. Attending on, serving, paying homage to; — servant, &c. = pari-ćārak, q.v.
s.f. = the next, q.v.
s.f. = the next, q.v.
s.f. Attendance, service, dependence; devotion, veneration, adoration, worship.
s.m. Acquaintance. familiarity, familiar intercourse, intimacy
subs: (-se), To have or maintain acquaintance or intimacy (with), to have knowledge (of).

def: s.f. = parīććhā, parīkshā, q.v.
s.f. = parīkshā, q.v.
s.m. Cover, covering, clothing; surroundings, domestic utensils or implements, goods and chattels; retinue, train, attendants, family, dependants; necessaries for travelling; paraphernalia, baggage.
s.m. = parīkshak, q.v. adj. & s.m. (f. -ikā), Trying, testing, examining; — prover, examiner, experimenter, assayer, investigator, judge.
part. Invested, enveloped, covered, clothed; surrounded (with), encompassed, attended.

s.m. Division, separation, discrimination (of false from true), accurate distinction or definition; distinguishing (between); determination, decision; the division of a book, section, chapter; a segment, division.
part. Cut off, divided, detached, singled out, defined; polished, clean, clear; excellent, good.
part. = parīkshit, q.v.
more: 1. adj. Examined. 2. n. prop. Grandson of Arjun.

def: part. adj. To be known; fit to become acquainted (with); sociable.
s.m. = parīkshaṇ, q.v. s.m. = S پريکشنا परीक्षणा parīkshaṇā, s.f. = parīkshā.
part. Known, acquainted (with), familiar (with).
s.f. Giving oneself up to the favour or protection of another; surrender, devotion.
s.m. = pari-dā, q.v. s.f. Giving oneself up to the favour or protection of another; surrender, devotion.
part. (of parīdan), Flown, taken wing.
s.m. Burning, combustion; mental anguish, pain, sorrow.
s.m. Flying, soaring on the wing (used in comp.).
more: n. m. P. پروا to fly. 1. A bird; the feathered race. 2. An ornamental hair tie.

def: adj. (One) possessed by fairies or demons, or who commands them.
s.m. Wrapping round, putting on, dressing, clothing; that which is put on, a garment (esp. an under garment), vesture, clothes.
more: n. m. S. प्रधान. 1. Chief; master; governor. Yā sansār meṅ karam pardhān . Prov. In this world fate is strongest. 2. A head man of a village; chief; minister or counsellor of state; president; a title. pardhān mantrī , n. m. The prime minister.
s. m. A president, leader, chief, a minister or counsellor of state.

def: s.m. = par-dhan, and paridhān, qq.v.
s.m. Carrying about, supporting, suffering, enduring.
s.m. The forty-first year of the Indian cycle, or of the sixty-years' cycle of Jupiter.
adj. & s.m. Fit or proper to be worn, wearable; — an under-garment.

s.f. That by which anything is surrounded or enclosed, fence, hedge, wall; a misty halo or circle round the sun or moon; a circle or disk of light, a glory; the horizon; circumference, periphery, compass; a frame of wood laid round a sacrificial fire (to keep it together).

s.m. An iron beam or bar for shutting or fastening a gate; an iron-mounted bludgeon, an iron club; a line of clouds crossing the sun at sun-rise or sun-set; the gate of a palace, or of a town, or of a house; name of the nineteenth stellar mansion.

s.m. Laying hold (of), seizing, grasping; taking, accepting, receiving, acceptance; surrounding, encircling; embracing; taking possession (of); possession, property; choosing, selecting; taking a wife, marrying, marriage; a wife, a husband; honouring, favouring; reverence, homage; grace, favour, patronage; apprehending, understanding, comprehension; undertaking, performing; subjugation; dominion; adherents, dependants, attendants, train, suite; family, household; a house, abode; root, origin.
s.m. Perception, thorough knowledge, learning.
s.m. Repelling (a charge), confutation; seizing, keeping back; contempt, disrespect, disregard.
s.m. Avoiding; leaving, abandoning; seizing, taking; refuting, repelling (a charge), rebutting; disrespectful treatment.
v.t. To take away, clear off; to leave, forsake, abandon, desert.
more: v. a. 1. To leave, forsake, abandon, desert. 2. To take away, to clear off.

def: s.m. Jesting, joking; mirth, merriment, jest, joke, laughter, pleasantry, sport; derision, ridicule, mockery
more: s. m. Jest, joke, jeer, jesting.

def: s.m. = pari-hās, q.v. s.m. Jesting, joking; mirth, merriment, jest, joke, laughter, pleasantry, sport; derision, ridicule, mockery
adj. & s.m. Laughing at, ridiculing, joking; — jester, wag, wit.
adj. & s.m. Laughing at, ridiculing, joking; — jester, wag, wit.
part. Waned, faded, wasted; deserted (by); deprived (of), destitute (of), deficient (in).
s.m. Surrounding company of people, attendants, servants, followers, retinue, train, suite; dependents, family, household.
more: n. m. S. परिजन, from परि all around, जन man. Attendants; dependants; household; kith and kin.

def: s.m. The coral tree, Erythrina indica; name of one of the five trees of paradise (which was produced at the churning of the ocean).
part. Made, invented; contrived, arranged, devised; found out; forged.
s.m. One who gives himself to devout contemplation, contemplative saint, ascetic.
s.m. Attendants, dependants, followers, retinue, train; girdle, girth, zone, sash, a cloth worn round the loins; a bed.
s.f. Work of flction, tale, story.
s.f. Moat, ditch, trench or fosse round a town or fort.
s.m. See s.v. parī for compounds of which parī is the first member. s.f. Time, turn, &c. = bārī, q.v.; — a cup; a large leathern vessel
more: s. m. A magician, one who holds the fairies and genii in subjection.
subs: v.n. To arrange to take by turns.

def: s. f. Exorcising, calling aid from fairies.
part. adj. Regarded as; called, named; celebrated, famous ( = pra-khyāt).
s.f. Reputation, fame ( = prakhyāti).
s.m. Vexation, trouble.
part. Vexed, annoyed, sorely troubled, pained, harassed.

s.f. Walking round or about; circuit, circumambulation; the going round a person or an idol to the right as an indication of reverence ( = pradakshiṇ); (in Astron.) revolving, revolution; a covered way round a temple
more: s. f. Act of going round to the right by way of adoration, circumambulation, going about. See طواف.
subs: pari-kramā karnā, pari-kramā lenā (-kī), To walk round a person, or an idol, by way of adoration, &c. ( = pradakshiṇ karnā); to go round, make a circuit.

def: s.m. Redemption, purchasing back, buying off; giving up a part of a treasure to preserve the rest.
direct plural of پَرِیکْشا (parīkśā)
s.f. = parīkshā, q.v.
s.f. Investigation, examination, experiment, test, trial, proof; — discrimination, judgment, penetration; trial by ordeal of various kinds
subs: (-kī), To make trial (of), to examine, test, &c.
adj. Connected with proof, &c.: parīkshā-yukti, s.f. An arrangement for proof, &c.
wety: Learned borrowing from Classical Sanskrit परीक्षा (parīkṣā).

def: adj. & s.m. (f. -ikā), Trying, testing, examining; — prover, examiner, experimenter, assayer, investigator, judge.
s.m. = S پريکشنا परीक्षणा parīkshaṇā, s.f. = parīkshā.
s.f. = S پريکشن परीक्षण parīkshaṇ, s.m. = parīkshā.
adj. & s.m. (f. -inī) = parīkshak, q.v. adj. & s.m. (f. -ikā), Trying, testing, examining; — prover, examiner, experimenter, assayer, investigator, judge.
s.m. = parīkshit, q.v.
part. Carefully inspected, investigated, tried, examined, tested, proved.
more: 1. adj. Examined, tried, proved. 2. Grandson of Arjun.

def: s.m. Name of a king, son of Abhimanyu and grandson of Arjun. (It is to this king that the Bhāgavat Purāṇ was related).

s.m. Fragrance, perfume (esp. arising from the trituration of fragrant substances); a fragrant substance; the pounding or trituration of perfumes; sexual intercourse; — parched grain of juʼār (Holcus sorghum), or of bājrā (Panicum spicatum), parched Indian corn; — adj. Sweet-scented.
more: 1. adj. Sweet-scented. 2. s. m. Parched grain of joʼār or bājrā (Holcus sorgum and spicatus).

def: s.m. Measuring; measure, capacity, proportion, quantity, amount, dose, degree; length, size, magnitude; length of time, duration; weight; number; value; compass, circumference
subs: adj. Having reference to degree or quantity.

def: adj. Very dull or faint; very slow; very tired.
adj. & s.m. Round, circular, globular, spherical; — circle, circumference; orbit; ball, globe, sphere, orb.
s.f. = S پرمنڐلتو परिमण्डलत्व pari-manḍalatva, s.m. Roundness, rotundity, circularity.
s.m. = S پرمنڐلتا परिमण्डलता pari-manḍalatā, s.f. Roundness, rotundity, circularity.
s.m. Tracing, tracking, searching, seeking out, pursuing.
adj. & s.m. Tracking, seeking for, going after, pursuing, hunting; — searcher, pursuer, &c.
s.m. A measurer.
s.m. A measurer.
part. Measured, meted; circumscribed, limited, defined; moderate, sparing; joined; regulated
s.f. = S پرمتتو परिमितत्व pari-mitatva, s.m. Limitedness, moderation, limited or restricted condition.
s.m. = S پرمتتا परिमितता pari-mitatā, s.f. Limitedness, moderation, limited or restricted condition.
s.f. Measure, quantity, limitation.
part. Faded, withered; waned; diminished, impaired; soiled, stained.
s.m. The act of bewildering; beguiling; fascination, infatuation.
adj. (f. -inī), Fascinating, infatuating, bewitching.
adj. Past, elapsed; ancient: — pārīna daftar s.m. Ancient record.
s.m. Compass, circumference, extent, width, breadth.

s.m. Change, alteration, transformation; digestion; ripeness, maturity, fulness; result, consequence, issue, effect, event; end, close, termination, last stage or state: pariṇām, or pariṇām-meṅ, adv. In the end, lastly, finally, at last, afterwards; at the close of life
more: n. m. S. प्रणाली A gutter; drain; conduit. Panchoṅ kā kahnā sir āṅkhoṅ par, magar parnālā yaṅhīṅ rahegā . Prov. I bow before the judgment of the Panch (corporation), but the drain shall remain where it is. (Said of stubbornness).
subs: adj. & s.m. Looking forward to the issue or consequences (of any act or event), prepared for a change, forecasting, provident, prudent; — a prudent or provident person, &c.

def: s.m. 'Leading the bride round the sacred fire,' marriage.
wety: Inherited from Sauraseni Prakrit 𑀧𑀭𑀺𑀡𑀻𑀤 (pariṇīda), from Sanskrit परिणीत (pariṇīta, “married”, adjective).

def: adj. & s.m. Relating or pertaining to marriage; obtained on the occasion of marriage; — property received by a woman at the time of her marriage.
s.m. = pari-ṇay, q.v. s.m. 'Leading the bride round the sacred fire,' marriage.
direct plural; oblique/vocative singular
oblique plural of پَرِنْدَہ (parinda, “bird”)
vocative plural of پَرِنْدَہ (parinda, “bird”)
s.m. Lion; a large snake (boa).
s.m. = pari-vār, q.v. s.m. Surroundings, train, suite, retinue, followers, attendants, dependants, subjects; family, household, friends, relations, kindred
subs: parivār-vant, adj. & s.m. Having numerous followers or attendants; — one who has a great retinue.

def: adj. = pari-pakva, q.v. adj. Completely cooked or dressed; completely burnt (as a brick); digested; quite ripe, mature; highly cultivated or educated, very knowing or shrewd; near death or decay, decaying.
s.m. Being completely cooked or dressed; digestion; ripening, maturity, perfection; cleverness, shrewdness, experience.
s.m. Being completely cooked or dressed; digestion; ripening, maturity, perfection; cleverness, shrewdness, experience.
s.f. The plant Ipomæa turpethum (used as a drug).
adj. Completely cooked or dressed; completely burnt (as a brick); digested; quite ripe, mature; highly cultivated or educated, very knowing or shrewd; near death or decay, decaying.
s.f. = S پرپکوتو परिपक्वत्व pari-pakvatva, s.m. The state of being completely cooked; digestion; ripeness, full maturity, perfection; shrewdness, knowingness; fluency.
s.m. = S پرپکوتا परिपक्वता pari-pakvatā, s.f. The state of being completely cooked; digestion; ripeness, full maturity, perfection; shrewdness, knowingness; fluency.
adj. & s.m. Guarding, protecting, defending, maintaining, supporting, sustaining; — protector, guardian, nourisher, cherisher, maintainer, &c.
s.m. Protecting, cherishing, defending, maintaining, sustaining, keeping; protection, nurture
part. Protected, cherished.
s.m. Antagonist, opponent, enemy, adversary; robber, highwayman, bandit.
s.m. Highwayman, robber, thief.
s.m. Antagonist, opponent, enemy, adversary; robber, highwayman, bandit.
s.f. Succession, order, method, arrangement; arithmetic.
s.m. Name of one of the seven principal mountain-ranges of India (the central or western portion of the Vindhya chain which skirts the province of Malwa).
s.m. A fragrant grass, Cyperus rotundus.
adj. & s.m. Swimming about; undulating, waving, shaking, tremulous, unsteady; — inundation; bathing, wetting, immersing; — a ship, boat.
part. Flooded, inundated; wetted, bathed, immersed.
s.m. Honouring highly, worshipping, adoring.
part. Much honoured, served, worshipped, adored.
part. Filled; satisfied, completed, fulfilled; brimful.
adj. Quite full, very full, brimful, completely filled, entire, complete, replete; fully satisfied, content, self-satisfied.
more: from परि or प्र and r. पूर Fill) adj. Brimful.

def: s.f. = S پرپورنتو परिपूणत्व pari-pūrṇatva, s.m. Completion, completeness, entireness, fulness; satisfaction, satiety.
s.m. = S پرپورنتا परिपूर्णता pari-pūrṇatā, s.f. Completion, completeness, entireness, fulness; satisfaction, satiety.
s.f. A species of cucumber, Cucumis maderaspattanus.
s.m. Accomplishing, effecting, bringing to a conclusion; arranging, settling; determining, ascertaining.
s.m. The act of finishing completely; entire completion ( = pari-samāpti).
part. Fully completed, completely finished, entirely done.
s.f. Entire completion, end, conclusion.
part. adj. To be doubted or distrusted; to be feared or apprehended.
s.f. An exhaustive enumeration; recapitulation; reckoning.
part. adj. Counted, reckoned up; enumerated, specified exclusively.
s.m. Cursing, reviling, anathema.
s.m. Standing-place, position, site; verge, border, proximity, neighbourhood, environs, ground on the border of a river or mountain, or contiguous to a town, &c.; width, breadth, extent, dimension.
s.m. Remnant, remains, remainder, residue, rest; conclusion, completion, termination.
adj. & s.m. Pertaining to an assembly; — king's companion; retinue of a god; an attendant; person present at an assembly, spectator.
s.f. Assembly, meeting, audience, congregation, council.
s.m. Adorning, ornament, decoration, embellishment; finishing; polishing, cleaning, purification (by essential rites); initiation; the repairing a building.
part. Prepared, equipped; highly finished, polished; adorned, decorated, embellished; cleansed, scoured, purified (by initiatory rites)
subs: s.f. An altar or ground prepared for a sacrifice.

def: s.f. = S پرسيمن परिसीमन् pari-sīman, s.m. Boundary, border, extreme term or limit.
s.m. = S پرسيما परिसीमा pari-sīmā, s.f. Boundary, border, extreme term or limit.
part. adj. & s.m. Left, remaining; finished; — a supplement, appendix.
s.m. Cleansing, purifying; correcting; purification; justification; retaliation; paying, discharging a debt, quittance.
s.m. Cleansing, purifying; correcting; purification; justification; retaliation; paying, discharging a debt, quittance.
s.m. Becoming completely dried up, dryness, desiccation, evaporation.
s.m. = pari-śram, q.v.
s.m. Fatigue, distress; fatiguing occupation, labour, exertion, effort, endeavour, toil, pains, trouble; industry
more: n. m. S. अम to labor. See. اُدم 1, 2. Binā parishram gun nahīṅ, gun bin nahīṅ bishrām; Dukhi hot haiṅ ālasī, sabhā bikhe apmān . Dohā No merit pains without, of merit void no rest, Unhappy all the idle are, at feasts no honored guest.

def: adj. Active, industrious, energetic, laborious, painstaking.
adj. Active, laborious.
part. Thoroughly fatigued, worn out, exhausted, wearied.
s.f. Fatigue, exhaustion; labour, toil, trouble, distress.
s.m. = parī-stān, q.v.s.v. parī.
more: n. m. P. parī fairy, stān , S. स्थान place. Fairyland.
(پري Fairy, and ستان Place) s. m. Fairy-land.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian پَرِیسْتَان (parīstān), from پَرِی (parī) + ـسْتَان (-stān). By surface analysis, پَری (parī) + ـسْتان (-stān).

def: part. Completely cleansed, cleaned, purified; acquitted, discharged; cleared off, paid.
adv. = pari-tas, q.v. adv. Around, round about, all around, on all sides, on every side, everywhere, in every direction, from all parts.
s.m. Glow, heat, scorching heat; pain, anguish, grief, sorrow, affliction; name of a particular hell.
adj. Burning hot, very hot; causing much pain or sorrow, causing anguish, torturing, tormenting.
adv. Around, round about, all around, on all sides, on every side, everywhere, in every direction, from all parts.
s.f. String of pearls for binding the hair; a trinket worn on the forehead where the hair is parted.
s.m. Complete satisfaction, gratification, contentment, contentedness, satiety, pleasure, delight, glee; — paritosh-vān, paritosh-vat, paritosh-vant, adj. Satisfied, contented, glad.
adj. Satisfying, gratifying, pleasure-giving.
s.m. Satisfying, gratifying; who or what satisfies or makes content; — satisfaction, &c. = paritosh, q.v.
s.m. Who or what gratifies, one who satisfies completely, satisfier; who or what pleases or makes very glad.
s.m. Who or what gratifies, one who satisfies completely, satisfier; who or what pleases or makes very glad.
adj. & s.m. Completely satisfied, contented; — a contented person.
adj. & s.m. Gratifying, delighting, making happy, satisfactory, consolatory; — reward, gratuity (given as a token of satisfaction).
more: s. m. A gratification, a complimentary present.

def: v.t. To satisfy, to afford satisfaction or pleasure.
s.m. Protecting, protection, preserving, rescuing, rescue, deliverance, preservation, defence, salvation.
s.m. Protector, defender, rescuer, saviour.
s.m. Protector, defender, rescuer, saviour.
part. Completely satisfied, contented, much pleased, delighted.
s.m. Abandonment, desertion, repudiation, divorce, rejection; renunciation, sacrifice, abdication; neglect, omission; loss, privation
s.m. Abandoning, deserting, &c. ( = pari-tyāg, q.v.). s.m. Abandonment, desertion, repudiation, divorce, rejection; renunciation, sacrifice, abdication; neglect, omission; loss, privation
adj. Abandoning, quitting, forsaking, deserting, repudiating, relinquishing, resigning, renouncing.
part. Left, quitted, deserted, abandoned; bereft (of), deprived (of), void (of).
s.f. The first day of a lunar fortnight, the first day of the moon's increase or wane.
more: s. f. The first day of a lunar fortnight, the first of the moonʼs increase or wane.

def: s.f. The first day of the moon.
s.f. = pariwā, q.v. s.f. The first day of a lunar fortnight, the first day of the moon's increase or wane.
more: s. (dakh.) A boat, barge, ferryboat ( Harris ).

def: s.m. Abuse, reproach, reproof, censure, detraction, stigma, slander, calumny; charge, accusation.
s.m. = pari-vād, q.v. s.m. Abuse, reproach, reproof, censure, detraction, stigma, slander, calumny; charge, accusation.
adj. & s.m. Speaking ill (of), reviling, abusing, blaming, reproaching, slandering; — an accuser, plaintiff, prosecutor; reprover; reviler, calumniator.
adj. & s.m. Speaking ill (of), reviling, abusing, blaming, reproaching, slandering; — an accuser, plaintiff, prosecutor; reprover; reviler, calumniator.
s.m. Overflowing, overflow, inundation; watercourse, drain.
more: n. m. S. वह to carry. 1. The overflowing of a tank; overflow, natural or artificial; inundation. 2. Stream; current of a river. 3. A water course or drain to carry off excess of water. Dhān ke khet meṅ parah le āo . 4. Throwing into the water. parivāh karnā , v. a. To throw, or cast into the river.

def: s.m. Surroundings, train, suite, retinue, followers, attendants, dependants, subjects; family, household, friends, relations, kindred
more: n. m. S. परिवार Family; household; relations ( kuṭumb ); kindred; connections.
subs: parivār-vant, adj. & s.m. Having numerous followers or attendants; — one who has a great retinue.

def: s.f. = S پروارتو परिवारत्व pari-vāratva, s.m. Subjection, dependence.
s.m. = S پروارتا परिवारता parivāratā, s.f. Subjection, dependence.

s.m. Revolving, revolution (of a planet, &c.); a period of time; lapse or expiration of time, end of the period of four ages; destruction of the world; going or turning back, flight, retreat, desertion; transmigration; change, exchange, barter; return, requital, recompense, reciprocity.
s.m. Change, exchange, barter; return, requital.
adj. Moving round, revolving; retreating, flying; exchanging; requiting, recompensing.
part. Turned round, revolved; returned, retreated; taken, or put on, in a wrong direction; exchanged.
s.m. = pariwār, q.v. s.m. Surroundings, train, suite, retinue, followers, attendants, dependants, subjects; family, household, friends, relations, kindred
subs: parivār-vant, adj. & s.m. Having numerous followers or attendants; — one who has a great retinue.

def: s.m. Abiding; abode, residence, stay, sojourn.
s.m. Complete or accurate knowledge; discussion; anguish, pain, misery; the marrying of a younger brother before the elder; marriage.
s.f. Shrewdness, wit; prudence, foresight, caution; anguish, &c. ( = parivedan).
s.m. Surrounding, enclosing; circumference; halo (round the sun or moon); — attendance, waiting (upon), distributing food, serving up meals.
s.m. One who serves up meals, waiter, carver.
s.m. = pari-veshaṇ, q.v. s.m. Surrounding, enclosing; circumference; halo (round the sun or moon); — attendance, waiting (upon), distributing food, serving up meals.
part. Surrounded, enclosed, encompassed; covered, veiled.
s.m. = pari-veshṭā, q.v. s.m. One who serves up meals, waiter, carver.
part. Surrounded, enclosed.
s.m. A wandering religious mendicant.
s.f. Strolling, wandering about from place to place; leading the life of a religious mendicant, ascetic devotion, abandonment of the world.
part. Revolved, gone round; turned back, returned, retired, retreated; exchanged, bartered; surrounded, encompassed, attended.
s.m. A species of reed, Calamus fasciculatus; a species of tree, Pterospermum acerifolium.
s.f. A young buffalo (female; — cf. paṛūʼā).
more: s. f. A female buffalo calf.

def: adj. Fairy-like, &c. = parī-zād, q.v.
more: adj. Fairy-like; beautiful; good-looking; fair; lovely.

E. n. f. 1. A young female buffalo (W. kaṭyā ). 2. (W. paṛokyā) . A low Brahman who takes from Hindus alms, such as oil, old black blankets, etc. all black things, on every Saturday which is accounted a black day.

n. f. Dim. of puṛā . 1. Any thing wrapped up in paper or leaves. 2. An offering to a God or Deity. 3. ( Med ). a powder. 4. Majenta, etc. in papers. puṛyāṅ uṛānā , v. n. To make offerings of abīr and seṅdūr to a saint. Shartī uṛāūṅ puṛyāṅ, aur dūṅ khaṛā maiṅ daunā, Gar ab-ke mujh se mil jāë, aë pīr, merī bājī . Mah. Wom. Rangīṅ. I vow I'll instant offerings lay my saint before, If but my eldest sister I embrace once more!

def: s.m. = pāri-pātra, q.v. s.m. Name of one of the seven principal mountain-ranges of India (the central or western portion of the Vindhya chain which skirts the province of Malwa).
adj. Fairy-born; a fairy, a beauty.
n. m. S. प्रजा धर्म्म. The duties of subjects; loyalty.
s.f. Order, method; custom, manner; place, room.
s. f. 1. Order, method, custom, manner. 2. Place, room.
v. n. To lie down; to repose, to cease (as the wind), to abate.
s.f. The plant Cucumis aromatica, or C. xanthorrhiza.
s.m. A bedstead ( = palang).

s.m. = paryant, q.v. (pari+anta), s.m. & postp. Boundary, limit, edge, skirt, border, extremity; end, termination; — up to, as far as, to the extent of; unto, until. (It is annexed to an accusatival base or to an adverb.)
s.m. A rain-cloud, thunder-cloud; rain; the god of rain.

n. m. S. प्रजापति. 1. An epithet of Brahma; Creator. 2. A king; a prince; a lord; a governor. 3. ( parjāpat .) A title of potters ( kumhār ). Parjā pat, is khilaune kā kyā loge? Potter, what will you take for this toy?
s.m. Wandering about, roaming, travelling.
s.m. Wandering about, roaming, travelling.
s.f. See s.v. para, par. s.m. Quicksilver, mercury; — adj. Heavy, weighty
subs: pārā pilānā (meṅ, -ko), To fill or load with quicksilver; to make heavy

def: s.m. Ground rent levied on houses; quit-rent, tax.
s.m. An adulterer.
s.m. Ground rent levied on houses; quit-rent, tax.
more: n. m. Ground rent levied on houses.

def: s.m. = parjank, paryank, q.v. s.m. A bedstead ( = palang).
